_comment: Checked-in relevance judgments for the search-quality gate (bead coding_agent_session_search-guided-ops-repro-trust-5u82n.7). Each qrel's `query` is a single distinctive token from the corpus; `expected_refs` are the session stems that should appear in the top-k. Single-ref queries use a keyword unique to one doc (deterministic recall=1.0); q-shared-recall expects the two docs that both carry `sharedtopic`. Edit alongside corpus.json; the gate proves observed == expected on a real index.

qrels.note: code-heavy session; unique keyword maps to exactly one doc
multi-ref recall across the code-heavy and NL-debugging sessions
stale advice; live trust verdict for this hit must be `stale`
privacy-sensitive fixture; report must not echo the body email
